title: HCSP Save Data Wrapper
description: A schema to wrap around Hack Club Space Program's save data in the web.

name.title: Save name
name.description: The name of the save that this object is tied to.

kind.title: Object kind
kind.description: What kind of relation this object has in relations to the save.

discrim.title: Object discriminator
discrim.description: A discriminator to discriminate between objects relating to the same save, with the same kind. Used for e.g. differentiating between quicksaves.

data.title: Binary data
data.description: The inner save data. This is usually a Uint8Array containing a zlib-compressed CBOR-encoded byte array.
